title: splice vs merge on spliceColumns
author: yogithesymbian
body:
any updates for this issue https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs#splice-vs-merge ?
i have a column in the middle of column that have merge , need to delete . :( any solution ???

comments.author: yogithesymbian
comments.body:
i have tried with **unmerge**
```
  worksheetPS.unMergeCells('P9') // at 16 - 27
  worksheetPS.unMergeCells('P10') // at 16 - 21
  worksheetPS.unMergeCells('V10') // at 22 - 27
  worksheetPS.spliceColumns(16, 27) // remove/delete from 16 - 27 , i have columns until 35
```
then my columns at **28 - 35** the values are gone ...
the **merge move** is correctly, but **value is gone**
